initiatingPartyId.description: Unique identifier of the message sender.

messageId.description: A point-to-point unique identifier is assigned to every message by the message initiator.

creationDateTime.description: ISO 8601 format date and time in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) when this message was created.

businessType.description: Unique identifier assigned by Mastercard to define the commercial product construct. * Refer to Codes and Formats section for more details.
